items.title: pip & requirements.txt
items.description: Poetry replaces the manual pip + requirements.txt workflow with declarative pyproject.toml and a solver-backed lockfile.

items.title: Lockfiles & Reproducibility
items.description: poetry.lock is a concrete example of a lockfile guaranteeing reproducible installs.

items.title: venv & virtualenv
items.description: Poetry creates and manages a virtual environment for you instead of manual venv activation.
